name: Rod of Absorption
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Can absorb spells and convert them into energy for casting your own spells.

name: Rod of Alertness
stat_impact: Permanent: Grants Advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks and Initiative rolls while held.

name: Rod of Lordly Might
stat_impact: Permanent: While held, functions as a +3 magical weapon (form varies). Provides other situational utility.

name: Rod of Resurrection
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Allows casting of Resurrection, Heal, and Restoration spells.

name: Rod of Rulership
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Allows charming creatures within 120 feet as an action.

name: Rod of Security
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Transports user and up to 190 others to a paradise demiplane.

name: Rod of the Pact Keeper, +1
stat_impact: Permanent: +1 bonus to Warlock spell attack rolls and spell save DC while held.

name: Rod of the Pact Keeper, +2
stat_impact: Permanent: +2 bonus to Warlock spell attack rolls and spell save DC while held.

name: Rod of the Pact Keeper, +3
stat_impact: Permanent: +3 bonus to Warlock spell attack rolls and spell save DC while held.

name: Rod of Vonindod
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Used specifically for tracking fragments of Vonindod (Giant-related).

name: Rod of Retribution
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Reaction: Deal 2d6 lightning damage to an attacker within 60 feet.

name: Tentacle Rod
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Used as a weapon to make three tentacle attacks; can reduce speed and impose disadvantage.

name: Immovable Rod
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Defies gravity when button is pressed; can hold up to 8,000 lbs.

name: Rod of Hellish Rebuke
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Reaction: Cast Hellish Rebuke at 4th level.
